case.title: SPAHOS ET AL. v. MAYOR OF SAVANNAH BEACH

opinion.h1: SPAHOS ET AL. v. MAYOR OF SAVANNAH BEACH, 371 U.S. 206 (1962)
opinion.h4: SPAHOS ET AL. v. MAYOR OF SAVANNAH BEACH, TYBEE ISLAND, GEORGIA, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF GEORGIA. No. 474. Decided December 10, 1962.
opinion.p: Aaron Kravitch and Phyliss Kravitch for appellants.
Anton F. Solms, Jr. for appellees.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
371 U.S. 206 STOCK v. TERRENCE, STATE HOSPITAL DIRECTOR. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 437. Decided December 10, 1962.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Louis J. Lefkowitz, Attorney General of New York, Paxton Blair, Solicitor General, and Joseph J. Rose, Assistant Attorney General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
